scripts.db:start: docker run -d --name valv-clickhouse -p 8123:8123 -p 9000:9000 -e CLICKHOUSE_DB=analytics -e CLICKHOUSE_USER=default -e CLICKHOUSE_PASSWORD=valv clickhouse/clickhouse-server:latest || docker start valv-clickhouse
scripts.db:reset: docker stop valv-clickhouse && docker rm valv-clickhouse && npm run db:start
